description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring lush green lawns, mature trees, and a variety of shrubs. The main building is rectangular with a gable roof and large windows, complemented by a detached garage or outbuilding to one side. The property includes paved walkways, a driveway, and a fenced perimeter, providing both access and privacy. The house exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with darker roofing and trim accents. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with garden beds and open grassy areas surrounding the structures. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural environment, ideal for family living.
description: A modern, gable-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by landscaped lawns, trees, and a detached garage. The property features paved walkways, a driveway, and a fenced perimeter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, garden beds, and the length of the house with visible windows and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the house with more windows and open lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, more garden space, and the relationship between the main building and the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a modest overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved path
